title: Containers on Amazon ECS with Mama J
summary: AWS Developers' educational video explains containerization concepts and how Amazon ECS orchestrates containers at scale. The content covers Docker image building, ECS as an orchestrator, Fargate vs EC2 deployment options, and practical auto-scaling examples.
writeup: This AWS Developers video covers containerization fundamentals and how Amazon ECS orchestrates containers at scale. It walks through building Docker images, ECS as an orchestrator, and the two deployment models: Fargate and EC2. Practical takeaways include the tradeoffs between Fargate (serverless, no host management) and EC2 (direct instance control), plus auto-scaling examples that show how ECS adjusts capacity to demand.
